regional.title: Regional Settings
regional.description: Set base currency, timezone, locale and AI language for the entire organization
regional.localeHint: Automatically changes currency, country and language
regional.currencyHint: All dashboard values are converted to this currency
regional.timezoneHint: Defines how "today" and date filters are interpreted in reports

team.title: Team
team.description: Manage who has access to this organization

aiPrompt.title: AI Prompt
aiPrompt.description: Paste in Cursor, Claude or ChatGPT — the AI reads your project and implements the integration automatically.
aiPrompt.copiedToast: Prompt copied! Paste in Cursor, Claude or ChatGPT.

installation.howToDescription: tracker.js collects data automatically — no npm, no SDK, no dedicated endpoints in your system.
installation.step1Desc: Each organization has its own key to authenticate events
installation.step2Desc: A single script captures pageviews, UTMs, device and referrer automatically
installation.step3Desc: Use Groware.track() to send event data like purchases and conversions
installation.snippetHint: Paste this script in the head of any page on your site. tracker.js automatically captures pageviews, UTMs, device and referrer. Use window.Groware.track() for manual events.

funnel.title: Funnel Steps
funnel.description: Define the steps you want to track in your conversion funnel
funnel.checkoutTipBody: If the project has a checkout (modal or separate page), add checkout_started as a step before payment. This enables abandonment analysis on the dashboard. The tracker automatically detects abandonment via beforeunload.
funnel.errorMinOneStep: Add at least 1 step to the funnel

organization.infoDescription: Name and URL used throughout the system
organization.nameValidation: Name must be at least 2 characters
organization.slugValidation: Slug must be at least 2 characters
organization.slugRegexValidation: Use only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens
organization.deleteDescription: Permanently removes all events, payments, channels and settings.
organization.deleteDialogBody: This action is {permanent}. All data will be lost:

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure automatic alerts for anomalies in your growth
notifications.infoText: Alerts will be triggered based on data collected by the tracker. Set thresholds according to your business's normal behavior.
notifications.noEventsDescription: Alert when no event is received for a given period
notifications.churnRateDescription: Alert when the cancellation rate exceeds the configured limit
notifications.revenueDropDescription: Alert when revenue falls below the configured percentage compared to the previous period

publicPage.title: Public Page
publicPage.description: Share your metrics publicly — building in public
publicPage.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. SaaS platform for digital invitations
publicPage.absoluteValuesDesc: When disabled, shows ranges (e.g. $4k–$5k) instead of real values
publicPage.sankeyDesc: Visual flow of new subscriptions, renewals and cancellations
publicPage.ticketMedioDesc: Average value per order or sale
publicPage.repurchaseRateDesc: Percentage of customers who bought again in the last 90 days
publicPage.revenueSplitDesc: Bar showing recurring vs one-time proportion

completeness.title: Organization profile
completeness.footerHint: Complete the profile for more precise and personalized AI analyses. Click pending items to go to the corresponding section.

exchangeRates.title: Exchange Rates
exchangeRates.warningText: Update rates regularly to keep P&L accurate. Events received with a currency other than {currency} will be rejected if the rate is not configured.
exchangeRates.noRatesHint: If your organization only sells in {currency}, no configuration is needed.
exchangeRates.errorFillFields: Please fill in all fields correctly.

aiProfile.title: AI Profile
aiProfile.description: Context sent to AI for more precise and actionable analyses
aiProfile.footerHint: This information is sent along with financial data to contextualize the AI analysis. The more precise the context, the more relevant the recommendations.
aiProfile.taxDescNone: AI does not consider taxes in profitability analyses
aiProfile.taxDescMei: AI considers a fixed ~5% rate (DAS) in margin recommendations
aiProfile.taxDescSimplesNacional: AI considers a ~6% rate in margin recommendations
aiProfile.taxDescLucroPresumido: AI considers a ~13.33% rate in margin recommendations
aiProfile.taxDescLucroReal: AI considers variable rate — provide context in segment for more precision

currentPlan.label: Current plan
currentPlan.orgLimitReached: Limit reached. Upgrade to create more organizations.
currentPlan.planIncludes: Your {planName} plan includes Stripe and MRR/Recurring — connect your gateway to see where every dollar of your revenue comes from.

page.footerText: All plans include Stripe and MRR/Recurring · Cancel anytime · No commitment

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect payment gateways to import revenue automatically
integrations.asaasTagline: Brazilian gateway with Pix and boleto

common.trackerCallout: Payments arrive automatically via webhook. tracker.js is still needed for UTMs, funnel events, and pageviews.

stripe.howToGetCredential: How to create your Restricted Key
stripe.tutorialStep1: In the Stripe dashboard, go to the **Developers** section;
stripe.tutorialStep4: Select **Provide this key to another website** and click **Continue**;
stripe.tutorialStep5: Type **Groware** in the Name field and enter **https://groware.io** in the URL;
stripe.tutorialStep6: Check the option **Customize this key's permissions** and click **Continue**;
stripe.tutorialStep8: Select *Write* for the resource **All webhooks** and click **Create key**;
stripe.tutorialStep9: Copy the generated secret key and paste it in the field above to finish.
stripe.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Stripe? Already imported data will be kept.
stripe.webhookStep1: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → Add endpoint
stripe.webhookStep2: Paste the URL and select the events listed below
stripe.webhookStep3: Click "Add endpoint" and copy the Signing Secret (whsec_...)
stripe.webhookWarning: The Signing Secret is different from the Restricted Key. Without it any request could send fake events to Groware.

asaas.howToGetCredential: How to get your API Key
asaas.tutorialStep2: Click the **Generate API Key** button (only if you haven't generated one before);
asaas.tutorialStep3: Copy and paste your API Key in the field above;
asaas.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Asaas? Already imported data will be kept.
asaas.webhookStep1: Asaas → Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → Add endpoint
asaas.webhookStep2: Paste the URL and select the events listed below
asaas.webhookStep3: Define an Access Token (any secret string) and paste it below
asaas.webhookWarning: The Access Token is the shared secret between Asaas and Groware. Use a long random string.

kiwify.tutorialStep1: In the Kiwify Dashboard, go to **Apps** > **API**;
kiwify.tutorialStep6: Copy and paste your **Client ID**, **Client Secret** and **Account ID** in the fields above and click **Connect**.
kiwify.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Kiwify? Already imported data will be kept.
kiwify.webhookStep1: Kiwify → Apps & Integrations → Webhooks → Add webhook
kiwify.webhookStep2: Paste the URL and select the events listed below
kiwify.webhookStep3: Define a **token** (any secret string) in the Token field and paste below
kiwify.webhookWarning: The token is the shared secret between Kiwify and Groware. Use a long random string. Kiwify does not use HMAC signatures — only direct token comparison.

hotmart.tutorialStep2: On the **Credentials** tab, click the **+ Create credential** button;
hotmart.tutorialStep3: Select the **Hotmart API** option and type **Groware** in the **Credential name** field;
hotmart.tutorialStep5: Click on the created credential to expand it;
hotmart.tutorialStep6: Copy and paste your **Client ID** and **Client Secret** in the fields above and click **Connect**.
hotmart.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Hotmart? Already imported data will be kept.
hotmart.webhookStep1: In Hotmart, go to **Tools** > **Webhook** > **My settings** tab > **+ Register webhook**. Type **Groware** as the configuration name and select the desired product (all or a specific one);
hotmart.webhookStep2: Paste the URL in the **Data delivery URL** field and select the events listed below
hotmart.webhookStep3: Click **Save**. Then go to the **Authentication** tab, copy the **Verification Hottok** and paste it in the field below;
hotmart.webhookWarning: The Hottok is auto-generated by Hotmart and sent on every webhook. Use the exact value shown in the Authentication tab — do not modify or create your own.

mercadopago.howToGetCredential: How to get your Access Token
mercadopago.tutorialStep1: Go to the **Developer Panel** of your Mercado Pago account;
mercadopago.tutorialStep4: Under **Which type of payment solution will you integrate**, select **Online payments**;
mercadopago.tutorialStep5: Under **Are you using an e-commerce platform?**, select **Yes**;
mercadopago.tutorialStep6: Under **Select the platform you will use to integrate**, choose **Other Platforms**;
mercadopago.tutorialStep7: Under **Which product are you integrating**, select **Checkout Pro**;
mercadopago.tutorialStep8: Check the boxes to agree with the **Terms and Conditions** and **reCaptcha**;
mercadopago.tutorialStep10: After creation, you will be redirected to the application settings;
mercadopago.tutorialStep13: Copy the URL **https://groware.io** and paste it in the **Site (optional)** field;
mercadopago.tutorialStep14: Check the boxes to agree with the **Terms and Conditions** and **reCaptcha**;
mercadopago.tutorialStep17: Copy the **Access Token** (starts with APP_USR-) and paste it in the field above, then click **Connect**.
mercadopago.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Mercado Pago? Already imported data will be kept.
mercadopago.importingToast: Importing Mercado Pago history in background...
mercadopago.importSuccessToast: Mercado Pago: {subscriptions} subscriptions, {payments} recurring, {oneTime} one-time imported.
mercadopago.connectedToast: Mercado Pago connected! Start importing history.
mercadopago.webhookStep1: Mercado Pago Developers → Your Integrations → your app → Webhooks → Configure notifications
mercadopago.webhookStep2: Paste the URL, select the events listed below and save
mercadopago.webhookStep3: On the same screen, copy the **Secret Key** (signature) and paste below
mercadopago.webhookWarning: The secret key is different from the Access Token. Mercado Pago validates each webhook via HMAC SHA-256 — without it, fake requests could inject events.

pagarme.howToGetCredential: How to get your Secret Key
pagarme.tutorialStep1: In your Pagar.me account, go to **Settings** > **Keys**;
pagarme.tutorialStep6: Enter your **Pagar.me account password** and click **Create key**;
pagarme.tutorialStep7: Copy the displayed token and paste it in the field above, then click **Connect**.
pagarme.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Pagar.me? Already imported data will be kept.
pagarme.webhookStep1: In your Pagar.me account, go to **Settings** > **Webhooks** and click **+ Create webhook**;
pagarme.webhookStep2: Paste the URL and select the events listed below
pagarme.webhookStep3: In **Max attempts** type **3**. In the **Password** field, set a strong secret (random string) and paste the **same value** in the field below — then click **Save** in Pagar.me;
pagarme.webhookWarning: The webhook "Password" on Pagar.me is what validates each event via HMAC SHA-1 signature. Use a long random string (do NOT use your Pagar.me account password). The same value must be pasted here and in the Pagar.me panel.
